title: Build an Astro project for production
description: Builds an Astro project using the `astro build` command

outputPath.description: Override the default output directory (default from astro.config)

mode.description: Build mode: 'static' for static site generation, 'server' for SSR

root.description: Project root path (usually provided by Nx)

additionalArgs.description: Additional CLI arguments to pass to Astro

generatePackageJson.description: Generate package.json and lockfile in the output path

skipOverrides.description: Skip overrides field in generated package.json

skipPackageManager.description: Skip packageManager field in generated package.json
